0.text: DIFC Courts Rules of Court Order No. 6 of 2017 in respect of Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts – establishing a Technology and Construction Division

1.text: SEPTEMBER 17, 2017 COURT ADMINISTRATIVE ORDERS of Order No. 6 DIFC Courts (/glossary/difc-courts/) Rules (/glossary/rules/) Court (/glossary/court/) of 2017 in respect of Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts – establishing a Technology and Construction Division

2.text: I, Michael Hwang, of the DIFC Courts, make the following Chief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/) Order: In exercise of the powers conferred on me by Article 8(3)(a) of Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004, as amended; and after having reviewed:

3.text:
Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the , as amended;DIFC (/glossary/difc/) Dubai Law No. 12 of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC, as amended; DIFC Law No. 10 of 2004, the DIFC Courts Law;   
and

4.text: DIFC Order No. 1 of 2014 in respect of the Rules of the DIFC Courts:

5.text: 1.This Order may be cited as Rules of Court Order No. 6 of 2017.

6.text: 2. By this Order, I issue Part 56 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts (“RDC”) – establishing a specialist Technology and Construction Division (“TCD”).

7.text: 3. In accordance with Rule 56.6 of the RDC, I hereby appoint Justice Sir Richard Field to be the in charge of the TCD.Judge (/glossary/judge/)

8.text: 4. Part 56 of the RDC will come into force on 1 October 2017.

9.text: 5. This shall fi rst be refl ected in the online version of the RDC, and subsequently in hardcopies published by the DIFC DRA Academy of Law.

10.text: Michael Hwang Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts
